summary: Local TV news segment (KFOX14) reporting on the TrumpRx.gov expansion to 600+ generic drugs, combining an anchor read, a website graphic, and clips of Trump at a TrumpRx.gov podium, with a weather ticker across the bottom. It has no music track.
notable_text: Find the world's lowest prices on prescription drugs (TrumpRx.gov graphic); TrumpRx.gov; KFOX14 weather ticker
